paperTitle: Unifying Perception and Action: A Hybrid-Modality Pipeline with Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Robotic Action Generation
organization: State Key Laboratory for Novel Software Technology, Nanjing University

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Suites: 1 task 99.1 · 2 tasks 94.9 · 3 tasks 91.2 · 4 tasks 87.8 · 5 tasks 84.5 | Table 1 | Notes: CALVIN ABC-D split, 1000 evaluation rollouts, avg_len metric reported

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero goal 95.1 · libero spatial 95.9 · libero object 98.9 · libero 10 96.8 | Table 2 | Notes: All 4 standard suites reported with 50 demos/task

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 57.4 · widowx vm 71.5 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 57.5 · move near vm 55.8 · open close drawer vm 58.9 · put spoon on towel vm 84.2 · put carrot on plate vm 68.8 · stack green block on yellow block vm 37.5 · put eggplant in yellow basket vm 95.6 | Table 3, Table 4 | Notes: Standard SimplerEnv VM protocol for Google Robot (3 tasks) and WidowX (4 tasks)
